name: Shopenkraft's Magic Goods
short_description: Become a magical shopkeeper in VR. Brew potions, forge weapons, and craft strange items for ridiculous fantasy customers. Unlock recipes, upgrade your shop, and survive the chaos.
detailed_description:
Supported devices: Meta Quest 2, Meta Quest 3, Meta Quest 3S

Welcome to Shopenkraft’s Magic Goods — a VR crafting game where your customers are magical, their orders are ridiculous, and you’re the one stuck fulfilling them. Potions? Sure. Axes? Of course. A glowing tiara made from a suspicious flower and a chunk of crystal? Don’t ask questions.

YOU are the shopkeeper. You brew, forge, enchant, improvise, and occasionally panic. All in a day’s work.

KEY FEATURES

  • Brew weird potions — Grind rare flowers, spill powder, stir until it bubbles, and hope the customer doesn’t turn into a frog (again).

  • Forge legendary weapons — Melt metal, pour it into a mold, smash it into shape, and pretend you knew what you were doing the whole time.

  • Craft magical trinkets — Combine the wrong ingredients and accidentally invent fashion.

  • Play your way — Go full chaos in Challenge Mode or relax in Cozy Mode (no timers, just vibes).

  • Unlock stuff — Progress through levels to upgrade your shop, discover new ingredients, and unlock even stranger recipes.

  • Keep going — Beat Challenge or Cozy mode to unlock Survival (how long can you last?) and Zen (how long can you chill?).

Your shop. Your mess. Your magical legacy!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese
